description_long: This object is a miniature snow-covered cabin with a rustic wooden texture, set on a white, snow-like base. The roof is thickly blanketed with snow, and colorful holiday lights are strung along the eaves. Two pine trees, also dusted with snow, stand beside the cabin, adding to the wintry scene. At the front, a small Santa Claus figure is depicted holding a sack, standing near the entrance. The cabin features a detailed door, windows, and a chimney, all rendered with a hand-painted, festive aesthetic. The overall appearance is charming and evokes a cozy, holiday-themed diorama.
description: A festive, snow-covered miniature cabin with pine trees and a Santa Claus figure, detailed with holiday lights and rustic textures.
description_view_0: The rear of the cabin is visible, showing wooden planks and the snow-covered roof, with part of a pine tree and the snowy base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the two snow-dusted pine trees closely flanking the cabin, with the roof and chimney visible.
description_view_2: The front of the cabin is shown, featuring the entrance, Santa Claus figure, and colorful lights along the snowy roof.
description_view_3: A side-front angle reveals Santa Claus more clearly, the cabin's door, and the snow-laden roof, with one pine tree in the background.
